mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND username = #{username}
SELECT * FROM users WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, nickname, avatar_url, signature, status, failed_login_count, locked_until, last_login_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{signature}, #{status}, #{failedLoginCount}, #{lockedUntil}, #{lastLoginAt})
mapper.update:
UPDATE users
nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, signature = #{signature}, status = #{status}, password_hash = #{passwordHash}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE users SET last_login_at = #{lastLoginAt}, failed_login_count = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE users SET failed_login_count = #{failedLoginCount}, locked_until = #{lockedUntil}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
